{"code":"
issues = sentry.list_issues(status="unresolved")
print(f"Total unresolved: {len(issues)}")
for i in issues:
    print(f"{i['id']} | count={i['count']} | level={i['level']} | title={i['title']} | project={i['project']}")

top = max(issues, key=lambda x: x['count'])
print("\nTOP:", top['id'], top['title'], "count=", top['count'])
"}
